description: Open bounties for visa data contributions. All submissions MUST include official government source URLs.

mustInclude: Page section where info is found

submissionFormat.description: When submitting updates or corrections, you MUST provide:

required.description: Direct URL to the official government visa/immigration page
How to navigate to the information on the government site
required.example: Home > Check if you need a visa > Country: Ghana > Purpose: Tourism

required.description: Exact text from the government source confirming the information
required.example: You'll need a visa to come to the UK as a Standard Visitor.

required.description: Date you accessed and verified the information

target.description: Add Schengen visa document privileges - countries that allow entry with valid Schengen visa

bounties.reason: Schengen visa unlocks many non-EU countries - major benefit for diaspora travelers
requirements: List all countries that allow entry with valid Schengen visa
Include conditions (multi-entry required, minimum validity, etc.)
⚠️ MUST include official government source URL for EACH country listed
Example source: Albania MFA - https://punetejashtme.gov.al/

sourceExample.quote: Citizens holding valid multi-entry Schengen visa may enter Albania without visa

target.description: Add US Green Card (permanent resident) privileges

bounties.reason: US permanent residents have significantly more visa-free access than visa holders
requirements: List all countries that allow entry with valid US Green Card
Differentiate from US visa privileges
Include conditions and maximum stay
⚠️ MUST include official government source URL for EACH country

target.description: Verify India e-Visa requirements and pricing are current for all countries

requirements: Check current e-Visa fee structure
Verify processing time
⚠️ MUST link to indianvisaonline.gov.in with exact page
Include screenshot if possible

target.description: Rwanda visa policy - confirm African Union visa-free policy implementation status

bounties.reason: Rwanda announced visa-free for all Africans - need to verify current implementation
requirements: Check current Rwanda visa policy
Verify if visa-on-arrival or fully visa-free
Check irembo.gov.rw for e-Visa status
⚠️ MUST link to migration.gov.rw or irembo.gov.rw

target.description: Verify UK visa fees and processing times are current

bounties.reason: UK visa fees updated regularly - ensure data accuracy
requirements: Check current Standard Visitor Visa fee
Verify processing time
⚠️ MUST provide link to gov.uk/standard-visitor with exact quote

target.description: Verify UAE visa requirements - recent policy changes for some African countries

bounties.reason: UAE visa policies have changed for several African nations
requirements: Check current visa requirements for UAE entry
Note any recent visa-on-arrival additions
⚠️ MUST link to u.ae or icp.gov.ae (Immigration)

target.description: Add Canadian Permanent Resident card privileges

bounties.reason: Canadian PR holders have visa-free access to many countries beyond passport privileges
requirements: List countries that allow entry with valid Canadian PR card
Include maximum stay and conditions
⚠️ MUST include official government source for EACH country

target.description: Kenya ETA (Electronic Travel Authorization) implementation verification

bounties.reason: Kenya introduced ETA system - need to verify which nationalities require it
requirements: Verify ETA requirements by nationality
Check fee structure and processing time
⚠️ MUST link to etakenya.go.ke with exact requirements

feedbackSubmissionGuidelines.title: How to Submit Updates or Corrections
feedbackSubmissionGuidelines.description: When you find incorrect or outdated information, submit a PR with the following:

requiredInPR.description: The EXACT URL from an official government website where the correct information is found
Step-by-step instructions to find the information on the government site
requiredInPR.example: 1. Go to gov.uk/check-uk-visa 2. Select 'Nigeria' 3. Select 'Transit' 4. See result

requiredInPR.description: Copy-paste the exact text from the government site that confirms your update
requiredInPR.example: "You do not need a visa if you... have a valid visa for Canada, New Zealand, Australia or the USA"

requiredInPR.description: Screenshot of the government page showing the information (helps speed up verification)

rejectionCriteria: Source is not from official government domain
Cannot verify information at provided URL
URL leads to visa agency, blog, or forum
Information in PR does not match source
